items.title: [Remoto] QA Pleno na BLIS
items.description:
## Descriรงรฃo da vaga

Somos o primeiro aplicativo do mundo que dรก acesso legal a Cannabis Medicinal. Com mais de 500 mil downloads, a blis estรก presente em mais de 800 cidades brasileiras, realizando todo o passo a passo necessรกrio para que qualquer pessoa encontre a sua melhor versรฃo.

https://apps.apple.com/br/app/blis-da-consulta-%C3%A0-entrega/id6474689421

## Local de trabalho
- 100% Remoto

PJ

## Benefรญcios da empresa

- 30 dias de descanso remunerado

## Como se candidatar

- Enviar e-mail para big@appblis.com com pretensรฃo salarial PJ e o currรญculo.

Apague os itens abaixo que nรฃo corresponderem ร  vaga. -->

items.description:
### Nossa empresa

O relacionamento da ITeam รฉ baseado no amplo comprometimento com os valores e objetivos dos nossos Clientes, fornecendo soluรงรตes e serviรงos de TI que contribuam para a realizaรงรฃo de seus objetivos.


### Descriรงรฃo da vaga

Atuarรก em projetos estratรฉgicos que envolvem UiPath + IA generativa (Gemini, Vertex AI ou similares), interaรงรฃo com outros times internacionais e รกreas de negรณcio, com participaรงรฃo ativa em decisรตes tรฉcnicas. Essa รฉ uma posiรงรฃo para quem gosta de resolver problemas complexos, desenhar soluรงรตes robustas e impulsionar inovaรงรฃo.


### Local


Sรฃo Paulo/SP - Paulista
Modelo Hรญbrido 2x por semana presencial


### Requisitos: 

Experiรชncia comprovada com projetos utilizando aplicaรงรฃo UiPath;
Experiรชncia prรกtica com IA aplicada a automaรงรฃo (Gemini, Vertex AI ou similares);

Experiรชncia com APIs, integraรงรตes e arquitetura de soluรงรตes;
Inglรชs avanรงado/fluente para reuniรตes internacionais
Forte capacidade analรญtica e perfil consultivo.

### Contrataรงรฃo

6 meses - com possibilidade de renovaรงรฃo
Regime: PJ

### Como se candidatar

Por favor, envie o currรญculo atualizado com a pretensรฃo de taxa/hora PJ para: viviane.pereira@iteam.inf.br

items.title: Feature: Enhanced Search & Filtering
items.description:
### Issue : 
The current job list is growing large. Users need better ways to find specific roles based on technical keywords or location.

### Improvement : 

Implement a client-side search or multi-select filter for the JobListComponent using the tech stack information already available in the repos.csv.

**File Path** :  `open-source-jobs/components/job-list.tsx`

**Code Idea** :

```
// Inside Joblist Component
const [filter, setFilter] = useState('');
const filteredJobs = releases.filter(job => 
  job.name.toLowerCase().includes(filter.toLowerCase()) || 
  job.description.toLowerCase().includes(filter.toLowerCase())
);
```

items.title: REMOTE - Principle Engineer/Solution Architect - Negotiable - Product Company in Aviation
items.description:
## Location 

* Remote from Vietnam 

## Salary Expectation

* Skill based, negotiate with company CEO in 1st interview

## Requirements 

- Academic Foundation: University degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a relevant technical field.

- Proven Track Record: 6+ years in senior engineering, technical lead, or architecture roles delivering full-lifecycle production systems (requirements through to operations).

- Architectural Expertise: Strong experience designing scalable backend systems using microservices, event-driven patterns, and schedulers.

- Integration Skills: Expert knowledge of APIs, web services, and message queues.

- Data Strategy: Deep understanding of data modeling (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) with a focus on pragmatic reliability and access patterns.

- Modern Stack Familiarity: Experience with Python frameworks and React/TypeScript to produce designs that are ready for rapid engineering implementation.

- Cloud & DevOps: Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Huawei), CI/CD pipelines, and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).

- Communication: Ability to write clear design specs, lead design reviews, and explain technical trade-offs in clear English.

- Stakeholder Mastery: Proven ability to drive decisions and align business, IT, and vendor teamsโeven in ambiguous situations.

- Agile Methodology: Solid understanding of standard SDLC and Agile development practices.

- Industry Advantage: Prior experience in Technology Consulting, Aviation, or Logistics is a plus. (not a must)

- Culture Fit: A passion for the startup environment and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, diverse, and team-oriented setting.

### Responsibilities 

- Lead end-to-end solution design, including technology selection (build vs. buy), cloud services, and integration patterns.

- Translate business requirements into solution architecture and a clear delivery plan.

- Define and own functional and non-functional requirements (performance, scalability, security, reliability, maintainability).

- Produce key architecture artefacts (HLDs, diagrams, API and data designs, ADRs) to guide engineering teams.

- Facilitate architecture design reviews and secure alignment before development starts.

- Partner with engineers throughout delivery to ensure solutions are implemented as designed and risks are addressed early.

- Manage architecture-level risks and guide teams through trade-offs and design decisions.

- Promote engineering best practices and mentor team members on architectural thinking.

### Youโll be responsible for

* Building aviation product for global airports.

### Why it would be awesome to work with us 

- High-impact work with real-world systems and meaningful scale.

- Work alongside and learn from leading experts in technology and aviation sector from different countries.

- Merit-based, startup-style culture with flexibility and autonomy.

- Remote-first environment with strong learning and growth opportunities.

### Contact 

Zalo/Whatsapp: 0905328693 (Ms Nora Nguyen)
Email: nora.careertalk@gmail.com

items.title: [Hรญbrido-Sรฃo Paulo/SP] Back-end Developer (NestJS) na Viaflow
items.description:
Descriรงรฃo da vaga
Na Viaflow, conectamos talentos de elite a projetos que transformam o mercado. Estamos em busca de uma Pessoa Desenvolvedora Backend (NestJS/Node.js) de altรญssimo nรญvel para atuar em um cliente global, focado em modernizaรงรฃo e soluรงรตes SaaS do zero.


Se vocรช tem domรญnio em NestJS, arquitetura de microsserviรงos e paixรฃo por sistemas escalรกveis em GCP, #VemPraViaflow!


โจ Se identificou? Entรฃo vem com a gente!

Responsabilidades e atribuiรงรตes
Arquitetura e Desenvolvimento: Projetar, desenvolver e manter serviรงos de backend escalรกveis utilizando NestJS e [Node.js](http://node.js/).
Integraรงรฃo de APIs: Construir e integrar APIs RESTful e/ou GraphQL para o frontend e sistemas externos.
Colaboraรงรฃo Multidisciplinar: Trabalhar estreitamente com engenheiros frontend ([React.js](http://react.js/)) para entregar experiรชncias de usuรกrio fluidas e integradas.
Cloud Native: Arquitetar e implementar microsserviรงos nativos da nuvem no Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
Sistemas Orientados a Eventos: Desenvolver sistemas event-driven utilizando plataformas de mensageria e streaming (ex: Pub/Sub, Kafka, etc.).
Excelรชncia Tรฉcnica: Garantir a seguranรงa, performance, escalabilidade e confiabilidade das aplicaรงรตes, implementando as melhores prรกticas de autenticaรงรฃo, autorizaรงรฃo e proteรงรฃo de dados.
Qualidade de Cรณdigo: Escrever cรณdigo limpo, de fรกcil manutenรงรฃo e bem testado, seguindo os padrรตes da indรบstria e participando ativamente de code reviews.
Lideranรงa Tรฉcnica: Participar de discussรตes de design tรฉcnico e decisรตes arquiteturais.
Operaรงรตes: Realizar o troubleshooting de problemas em produรงรฃo, otimizar a performance do sistema e colaborar com times de DevOps em pipelines de CI/CD e monitoramento.
Requisitos e qualificaรงรตes
๐ป Competรชncias Tรฉcnicas Essenciais
Sรณlida Experiรชncia: Desenvolvimento Backend utilizando NestJS e [Node.js](http://node.js/).

items.description:

items.title: [ๅพตๆ]Software Senior Principal Engineer
items.description:
Senior Principal Software Engineer



The Software Engineering team delivers next-generation software application enhancements and new products for a changing world. Working at the cutting edge, we design and develop software for platforms, peripherals, applications and diagnostics โ all with the most advanced technologies, tools, software engineering methodologies and the collaboration of internal and external partners.



Join us to do the best work of your career and make a profound social impact as a Senior Principal Software Engineer on our Software Engineering Team in [Taipei].

What youโll achieveAs a Software Principal Engineer on the HCI team, you will be responsible for leading the technical direction and architecture of Dell's AI and Solutions hyperconverged infrastructure platform. This role requires close collaboration with cross-functional teamsโincluding engineering, product management, and quality assuranceโto deliver high-quality software solutions that meet customer needs. You will drive technical innovation, mentor engineers, and champion best practices and emerging technologies, including AI tools usageYou will:

1.Technical Leadership:  Overlook cross Domain Engineering gap/risks and provide guidance to engineers to move forward to meet the Site development target.

2.Architecture: Design and implement scalable, secure, and efficient software architectures for HCI, leveraging cloud, virtualization, and storage technologies.

3.Innovation: Drive technical innovation and stay up-to-date with industry trends, emerging technologies, and Dell's technology strategy to ensure the products remain competitive and innovative.

4.Software Development: Lead the design, development, testing, and maintenance of HCI software applications and features, including API development, UI/UX enhancements, and backend infrastructure improvements.

5.Collaboration: Work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure timely delivery of high-quality solutions.

6.Problem-Solving: Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, perform root cause analysis and recommendations for improvement.

7.Mentorship: Mentor engineers and provide technical guidance to support their career growth and cowork as one team.

8.Strategy: Develop and implement technical strategies to align with business objectives, grow the site capabilities/efficiency.



Take the first step towards your dream careerEvery Dell Technologies team member brings something unique to the table. Hereโs what we are looking for with this role:Essential Requirements

โข Bachelo's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field or equivalent 10+ years of experience as a software Engineering leader

โข Proficiency in programming languages such as Python/Golang on Unix/Linux/BSD operating systems and understanding of data structures, algorithms, and analysis techniques

โข AIโEnabled Software Design and Development Skills: Experience applying AIโbased capabilities to support software design, development, testing, and troubleshooting throughout the engineering lifecycle.

โข Experience with network, storage, security product development 

โข Proven leadership experience, including mentoring and technical direction, enhance Engineering efficiency 

โข Ability to lead teams to design, develop and deliver major features on time with high quality

โข Able to engage with customers and support when needed to solve production issues

โข Excellent communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills

โข Familiarity with Agile development methodolofies (e.g. Scrum, Kanban)Desirable Requirements

โขExperience with cloud-native applications and microservices architecture

โข Knowledge of cybersecurity principles and practices

โข Experience with containerized orchestration systems (Kubernetes, Rancher, etc) is a plus

โข Certifications: Relevant certifications, such as VMware VCP or AWS Certified Developer, are a plus

โข Knowledge of DevOps practices and tools (e.g., Jenkins, Github CI/CD) is a plus

Who we are

We believe that each of us has the power to make an impact. Thatโs why we put our team members at the center of everything we do. If youโre looking for an opportunity to grow your career with some of the best minds and most advanced tech in the industry, weโre looking for you.Dell Technologies is a unique family of businesses that helps individuals and organizations transform how they work, live and play. Join us to build a future that works for everyone because Progress Takes All of Us.Application closing date: 30 March 2026Dell Technologies is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. Read the full Equal Employment Opportunity Policy [here](https://jobs.dell.com/equal-employment-opportunity-policy-statement).



**If you are interested in the position, please contact [lucy.liu1@dellteam.com ](mailto:lucy.liu1@dellteam.com).**
